Query:
UNLOAD (SELECT bs.bldg_id, bs.county, bs.state FROM comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_md_agg_by_state_and_county_parquet AS bs WHERE bs.upgrade = 0 AND bs.state IN ('CO', 'NM') AND (bs.bldg_id, bs.county, bs.state) IN (SELECT bs.bldg_id, bs.county, bs.state FROM comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_md_agg_by_state_and_county_parquet AS bs WHERE bs.upgrade IN (1) AND bs.applicability = true GROUP BY bs.bldg_id, bs.county, bs.state HAVING count(distinct(bs.upgrade)) = 1)) 
 TO 's3://resstock-core/bsq_athena_unload_results/a68be2642001b04171cd43f10173fd9a3da67fbc649efbafd3f51e30e0d8e4c6/2dc52b32-56fe-4bee-87b0-2baae8b8a150/' 
 WITH (format = 'PARQUET')
